tabs.appearance.label: Appearance
settings.theme.dark.label: Dark Theme
settings.theme.dark.description: Theme used when the terminal has a dark background
settings.theme.light.label: Light Theme
settings.theme.light.description: Theme used when the terminal has a light background
settings.symbolPreset.label: Symbol Preset
settings.symbolPreset.description: Glyph set for icons and symbols (Unicode, Nerd Font, or ASCII)
settings.symbolPreset.options.nerd.label: Nerd Font
settings.colorBlindMode.label: Color-Blind Mode
settings.colorBlindMode.description: Use blue instead of green for diff additions
settings.statusLine.preset.label: Status Line Preset
settings.statusLine.preset.options.defau: Model, path, git, context, tokens, cost
Maximum info with Nerd Font icons
settings.statusLine.separator.label: Status Line Separator
settings.statusLine.sessionAccent.label: Session Accent
settings.statusLine.sessionAccent.descri: Use the session name color for the editor border and status line gap
settings.statusLine.transparent.label: Transparent Status Line
settings.statusLine.transparent.descript: Use the terminal's default background for the status line instead of the theme's `statusLineBg`. Powerline end caps are dropped because they need a contrasting fill to bridge into the surrounding terminal.
settings.statusLine.showHookStatus.label: Show Hook Status
settings.statusLine.showHookStatus.descr: Display hook status messages below the status line
settings.terminal.showImages.label: Show Inline Images
settings.terminal.showImages.description: Render images inline in the terminal
settings.images.autoResize.label: Auto-Resize Images
settings.images.autoResize.description: Resize large images to 2000x2000 max for better model compatibility
settings.images.blockImages.label: Block Images
settings.images.blockImages.description: Prevent images from being sent to LLM providers
settings.terminal.showProgress.label: Native Terminal Progress
settings.terminal.showProgress.descripti: Emit OSC 9;4 indeterminate progress while the agent or context maintenance is running
settings.tui.textSizing.label: Large Headings (Kitty)
settings.tui.textSizing.description: Render Markdown H1 headings at 2x scale using Kitty's OSC 66 text-sizing protocol. Only takes effect on Kitty terminals; ignored everywhere else. Off by default.
settings.tui.renderMermaid.label: Render Mermaid Diagrams
settings.tui.renderMermaid.description: Render Mermaid fenced code blocks as ASCII diagrams
settings.tui.hyperlinks.label: Terminal Hyperlinks
settings.tui.hyperlinks.description: Wrap paths and URLs in OSC 8 hyperlinks for terminal-native click-to-open (auto: detect support; off: never; always: unconditional)
settings.tui.tight.label: Tight Layout
settings.tui.tight.description: Remove the 1-character horizontal padding from the left and right of the terminal output
settings.display.shimmer.label: Shimmer
settings.display.shimmer.options.classic: Soft cosine wave sweeping across the text
settings.display.shimmer.options.kitt.de: Knight Rider 1982 red light bouncing left-right
settings.display.smoothStreaming.label: Smooth Streaming
settings.display.smoothStreaming.descrip: Reveal assistant text and streamed tool input smoothly while chunks arrive
settings.display.showTokenUsage.label: Show Token Usage
settings.display.showTokenUsage.descript: Show per-turn token usage on assistant messages
settings.display.cacheMissMarker.label: Cache Miss Marker
settings.display.cacheMissMarker.descrip: Show a divider above an assistant turn whose request lost (missed) the prompt cache
settings.showHardwareCursor.label: Show Hardware Cursor
settings.showHardwareCursor.description: Show terminal cursor for IME support
settings.task.showResolvedModelBadge.des: Display the actual model ID used by each subagent in the task widget status line
